Temp Spoofer

Cleaner
Download Discord Source
Latest Version — Windows 10/11 Compatible

Generate a fresh hardware fingerprint with the built-in Temp Spoofer and wipe every trace of Epic Games, Fortnite and Anticheat leftovers from your system — all in a single click. View your full HWID, UUID, BIOS serial, motherboard, disks and MAC addresses in the new System Info tab, then watch the before/after comparison fire off live as the spoofer runs.
